problem id: 202af98d
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(3) XOR NOT SHL(1)) OR SHR(1)

examples:
  01000101 -> 01111111
  00000110 -> 11000011
  01000100 -> 01110111
  10011001 -> 01001101
  10101111 -> 11011111
  10101011 -> 11110101
  10001000 -> 11101111
  10111001 -> 01011100
  01001001 -> 00100111

query: 11110010
predicted answer: 11111101
